description: W.S.P. Wijewardena Vs.Urban Development Authority and Others W.S.P. Wijewardena Vs.Urban Development Authority and Others View More before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: W.S.P. Wijewardena Vs.Urban Development Authority and Others W.S.P. Wijewardena Vs.Urban Development Authority and Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner challenged the direction contained in the notification sent by the UDA for the service charges of a conversion of a residential property to a business premises. According to the UDA, the said charges were imposed based on the Regulations promulgated according to the relevant Acts and depending on the square foot area of the premises in suit. Therefore, without challenging the said regulations, the Petitioner cannot challenge the said direction of the notification. Held – the Petitioner is liable to pay the said charges if his application is for the said conversion which the UDA officials found the entire premises to have been converted into a business premises despite the Petitioner’s claim that only a part of the premises is to be converted into a business premises. Application dismissed.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
